artPrompt: The dramatic moment a goblin rally ignites: two scrappy goblins thrust handfuls of snacks and torches skyward beside a small controllable bonfire, sparks and confetti whirling up against night-black smoke, a foreshortened goblin fist punching toward the viewer in flame-orange glow. Torn blank bunting flaps overhead, ember light rims the cheering silhouettes, gleeful anarchic mayhem. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Campaign Rally
text:
Create two 1/1 red Voter creature tokens, then create a Snack token to hand out at the rally. (A Snack is a red artifact with "Sacrifice this artifact: You gain 1 life.")
Voters you control gain haste until end of turn. The crowd is energized.
flavorText: Doors at six, chanting at seven, small controllable fire at eight.
